rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NORRIS ROHDE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The previously listed issues are not completely cleared. The court to determine. (1) As to verifications: affidavits failed to meet CCP 2015.5 as they omit "I certify (or declare) under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California that the foregoing is true and correct" (2) As to Notice of hearing: New notices on file shows a 14-day service, not 15-days. Also, It does not clear the previously listed issues. (3) A certified copy of Letters from the Washington County, Texas Court. It needs to be filed conventionally according to LRSF 14.59.C. (4) The CA funds have been already transferred to TX while related petition has not been granted. (5) Attorney's fee declaration filed 12/5/23 does not meet CRC 7.702. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MELVIN FLEMING
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/27/23 for an appearance for the following issues: 1. Notice of Hearing showed just the amendment to the third amended petition, not also the third amended petition, for which notice was defective. 2. The proposed distribution is now to the executor, still not to the trustee of the devisee trust. 3. The probate referee was apparently paid for not appraising any assets. 4. There are still many references to an account or a summary of account when there is no account, and the purported summary of account is merely a list of some balance in a bank account and the assets that were included in the I&A. 5. Letters Testamentary, NOT of Administration, were issued to the EXECUTOR. 6. The statutory fee to the attorney has now been increased without any explanation. 7. No Corrected I&A was filed for the cash the executor appraised himself that was apparently incorrect. (Issues should be addressed in an amendment or a supplement without "answering" issues posted in a tentative ruling.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WENDY WAN GIN WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. The "supplement" actually amended the petition to reduce the statutory compensation and remove the request for a reserve; however, the Court will waive notice of the amending pleading because the proposed distributions have increased as a result (although the heirs presumably are not aware that they are entitled to more than was shown in the petition). (NB; Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).] Also, a proposed order is a proposed order until it is signed by a judge, without "[Proposed" being in the caption or footer. A courtesy copy is a SINGLE-sided copy and must be all pages of a filed pleading.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIE ANDREWS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/16/2024. The following issues are to be cleared two weeks prior. (1) Need Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number [JC Form DE-147S] to be filed. See the Local Rule of SF 14.18.E. (2) Need Duties of Liabilities of PR [Form DE-147] to be filed. (3) Need to re-notice. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate (1) failed to set forth that Petition seeks IAEA authority. #5 not affirmed. (4) Petition #8 to identify relationship to decedent of each person listed. (5) Petition #8 to identify the trustee. If the proposed personal rep is the sole trustee of the sole devisee trust, all trust beneficiaries must be listed and noticed. PC. (6) Notice to include Notice of Directions for Remote Appearances and Access to all persons who are entitled to notice. LR 4.1.C.(6). (7) Petitioner is also a known creditor. Need an allegation if the court needs to be concerned with conflicting interests. (8) Proposed Order to be submitted before the hearing. LRSF 14.7.A. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
